metadata.description: Claude Code skills for full-stack development, testing, API design, databases, CI/CD, Docker, dependency management, security, performance, logging, refactoring, documentation, git workflows, open source contributions, repository maintenance, context management, session management, planning, verification, CLAUDE.md generation, infrastructure as code, and monorepo management. Includes agents for autonomous code review, debugging, test generation, security scanning, plan review, verification, and more. Hooks for git safety, secret detection, and commit validation.

plugins.name: dev-workflow
plugins.description: Everyday dev commands -- commit, review, test, fix bugs, create PRs, check repo status, and inspect PR health. Agents: code-reviewer, debugger. Hook: auto-format.

plugins.name: dev-rules
plugins.description: Development guardrails -- git safety, security best practices, PR workflow discipline, context optimization, CLAUDE.md authoring rules, and important tag patterns. Hooks: secret-guard, no-force-push, branch-guard.

plugins.name: farm-stack
plugins.description: FARM stack (FastAPI + React + MongoDB) development patterns, scaffolding, and best practices. Agent: farm-scaffolder.

plugins.name: testing
plugins.description: Test strategy, framework patterns, mocking approaches, fixture design, and coverage guidance. Agents: test-runner, test-generator.

plugins.name: api-design
plugins.description: REST and GraphQL API design -- URL structure, HTTP conventions, error formats, pagination, authentication, versioning, and OpenAPI. Agents: api-reviewer, api-scaffolder.

plugins.name: database
plugins.description: Database schema design, migrations, indexing, query optimization, and connection pooling. Agent: schema-reviewer. Hook: migration-guard.

plugins.name: ci-cd
plugins.description: GitHub Actions CI/CD -- workflow templates, caching, matrix builds, secrets management, release automation, and debugging failing checks. Agent: ci-fixer.

plugins.name: docker-deploy
plugins.description: Docker best practices -- multi-stage Dockerfiles, compose patterns, image optimization, health checks, signal handling, and security hardening. Agent: dockerfile-optimizer.

plugins.name: deps-audit
plugins.description: Dependency auditing -- vulnerability scanning, outdated package detection, unused dependency identification, and safe update strategies. Agent: dependency-auditor.

plugins.name: oss-contrib
plugins.description: Open source contribution workflow -- upstream sync, CONTRIBUTING.md compliance, code style matching, PR preparation, CLA/DCO signing, AI disclosure, and PR quality bar. Agent: pr-analyzer. Hook: upstream-sync-check.

plugins.name: repo-polish
plugins.description: Repository hygiene -- .gitignore, .env.example, README, LICENSE generation, secret detection, project type detection, and CLAUDE.md auditing. Agent: repo-auditor.

plugins.name: refactoring
plugins.description: Safe refactoring workflows -- code smell detection, extract/rename/move patterns, migration strategies (JS to TS, CJS to ESM), and structured refactoring process. Agent: refactorer.

plugins.name: documentation
plugins.description: Documentation patterns -- README structure, ADRs, changelogs, code comments, API docs, and technical specs. Agent: doc-generator.

plugins.name: git-advanced
plugins.description: Advanced git operations -- rebasing, cherry-picking, conflict resolution, bisect, stash management, history exploration, and undo strategies. Agent: git-assistant. Hook: commit-lint.

plugins.name: performance
plugins.description: Performance optimization -- profiling, caching strategies, N+1 detection, bundle analysis, connection pooling, and benchmarking. Agent: performance-profiler.

plugins.name: security-hardening
plugins.description: Security hardening -- OWASP top 10 prevention, STRIDE threat modeling, supply chain security, API security checklist, security headers, rate limiting, input validation, CORS configuration, and vulnerability scanning. Agent: security-scanner. Hook: secret-scanner.

plugins.name: logging-observability
plugins.description: Logging and observability -- structured logging, health checks, error tracking, request correlation, metrics, and monitoring patterns. Agent: observability-checker. Hook: debug-log-check.

plugins.name: methodology
plugins.description: Structured development methodologies -- TDD red-green-refactor, BDD behavior specs, spec-driven development, plan-driven execution, and context engineering workflows. Agent: methodology-coach.

plugins.name: context-management
plugins.description: Context window management -- compaction timing, context rot prevention, branching strategies, and sub-agent isolation patterns. Agent: context-advisor.

plugins.name: session-management
plugins.description: Session lifecycle management -- when to start new sessions, rewind vs correct, handoff summaries, and multi-session workflow patterns. Agent: session-advisor.

plugins.name: planning
plugins.description: Implementation planning -- plan mode usage, interview-then-execute, prototype over PRD, and plan review patterns for multi-file features. Agent: plan-reviewer.

plugins.name: verification
plugins.description: Pre-completion verification -- backend, frontend, infrastructure, and general code change checklists before claiming work is done. Agent: verifier.

plugins.name: claude-md-generator
plugins.description: CLAUDE.md file generation and auditing -- project-specific templates for Python, React, Terraform, MERN, and monorepo workspaces. Agent: claude-md-auditor.

plugins.name: infrastructure
plugins.description: Infrastructure as code patterns -- Terraform, AWS CDK, CloudFormation best practices, module design, state management, and security scanning. Agent: infra-reviewer.

plugins.name: monorepo
plugins.description: Monorepo management -- CLAUDE.md loading rules, workspace organization, cross-package dependencies, and multi-project convention patterns. Agent: workspace-auditor.
